N_HJB_EVAP_UDS_SOP_20200211_N2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAE0F1
Recv ID: 18DAF1E0
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: E0
Func Name: EVAP_29b

    "diagversion": "1",
